notes: MLLM rederive slice fix: v1.3.77 regression (infinite 'A-I-A-A' token loops on hybrid-SSM T2 HIT with reasoning ON) resolved. Root cause was rederive producing SSM state-at-N keyed at N-1 — now slices tokens to prompt_len so state matches key. Qwen3.6-JANGTQ2, Qwen3.5-VL-4B verified: T2/T3 HYBRID HIT coherent content, no loops. Cross-API (OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama) reasoning routing verified. 546 cache/reasoning tests green.
